reviews.review_title: My review on this horrible game
reviews.review_description: Absolutely trash levels are barely playable because I will get stuck in some random objects absolutely do no buy you will regret like me i wish I could get a refund 😭 contact the owner and get a better team to make the game this looks like some game some 5 year old made on scratch please take what I say seriously!!!

developer_response.body: We’re sorry to hear that the game didn’t meet your expectations. We take all feedback seriously and are continuously working to improve the experience. If you have specific issues or suggestions, we’d love to hear them. Thank you for sharing your thoughts

reviews.review_description: DO NOT BUY it's so bad you will regret if you even look at this game you will cry I got stuck in a rock and the bike wouldn't even move DO NOT BUY

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your feedback, and we’re really sorry that you had such a frustrating experience.

Getting stuck on terrain — especially rocks — is definitely not the experience we want players to have. We are currently improving the bike physics and adding better collision handling so situations like this won’t happen in future updates.

We understand how disappointing it feels when a game doesn’t work as expected, and your comment helps us identify what needs to be improved the most.

We appreciate you giving the game a try, and we hope you’ll consider checking it out again after the next updates — the improvements should make a big difference.

reviews.review_description: I really liked the graphics and locations, which were chosen with high quality, and the approximate sensations of a real motorcycle. since it was released quite recently, there are small bugs, but they do not affect the gameplay, I hope that the developers will add new features and options to the game, because the basis of the game is very powerful

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review. We continue to roll out updates for our game, and we have a few more planned. We appreciate your valuable feedback. Have fun!

reviews.review_description:
This VR offroad motocross game has truly left a lasting impression on me! The visuals are stunning, and the game mechanics deliver an incredibly realistic experience. It's precisely the game I've been searching for to quench my thirst for motocross racing. The level designs are not only exciting but also pose a great challenge, keeping the gameplay consistently interesting. The addition of VR support enhances the immersion – I genuinely felt like I was on the back of a motorcycle. The variety of motorcycles is fantastic; I can't wait to try them all!

I wholeheartedly recommend this game to anyone considering giving it a shot. It undeniably deserves a solid 5 stars!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We will continue working to improve our game. Your valuable feedback will further motivate us in this regard.

reviews.review_description: This game offers an adrenaline-packed experience with its realistic motor mechanics and challenging offroad tracks. Every detail is impeccable.

Im sorry but this game just isnt ready for release, nothing seems to actually work as it should...throttle is all over the place and half the time doesnt work at all, hands randomly leave the handle bars, when you inevitably go off track it resets you in an awkward position, bike can get stuck with no way to fix it, bike graphics seem ok, actialy track graphics are not the worst but could use some work, backround graphics are awful...i really tried to get into it thinking i just needed to keep trying but could only take so much before giving up...for the price i didnt expect a top notch AAA title, but i did expect better than what was delivered based on the trailer...

developer_response.body: "We appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback. We understand that some aspects of the game may need improvement, and we’re actively working on refining the controls, bike behavior, and overall experience. Your points about track resets and graphics are noted, and we’ll take them into consideration for future updates. We’re continuously improving the game and hope to deliver a better experience in the future. Thanks for giving it a try
Lamentamos que la experiencia no haya sido la esperada. Agradecemos tu comentario y seguimos trabajando para mejorar el juego. Si tienes sugerencias específicas, nos encantaría escucharlas.

We’re sorry to hear you didn’t enjoy the game. We appreciate your feedback and are continuously working to improve the experience. If you have any specific issues or suggestions, we’d love to hear them. Thank you for giving it a try
